user_query:
I run a small Instagram page for our NYC theater circle, and June is packed for us. Please build a four‑week Instagram content plan that celebrates Victoria Clark and coordinates our group outings. Use the local inputs in input/ to guide the tone, dates, and what works well.

What I need
1) A June 2026 content calendar saved to output/content_calendar.csv with these columns:
- date (YYYY-MM-DD, between 2026-06-01 and 2026-06-28 inclusive)
- theme (one of: Appreciation, Event Reminder, Event Same-Day Check-In, Recap)
- event_id (E1/E2/E3/etc. from input/events.csv or blank)
- caption (<=220 characters; must align to input/voice_guidelines.md and include #VictoriaClarkFans)
- alt_text (<=120 characters; concise description suitable for accessibility)
- hashtags (comma-separated; include #VictoriaClarkFans plus at least one other relevant from our guidelines or past practice)

Calendar constraints to meet:
- Schedule at least 3 posts per week for the four weeks starting 2026-06-01 through 2026-06-28.
- For every June group event in input/events.csv (rows where is_group_event is true and the date falls in June), include exactly two posts: (a) an Event Reminder exactly 2 days before the event date and (b) an Event Same-Day Check-In on the event date.
- Include at least one weekly Appreciation post that references Victoria Clark and uses a question prompt to encourage comments (ground this in what performed well in input/past_posts.jsonl).
- Use at least two phrases from input/approved_snippets.txt across the month’s captions; mark their use by weaving them into appropriate captions.
- Where appropriate, incorporate logistics and accessibility notes from the events file into the relevant event posts’ captions or alt_text.
- Use the rewritten versions of the rough captions from input/draft_captions.md for the reminder posts tied to 2026-06-05, 2026-06-20, and 2026-06-26.

2) Rewritten captions saved to output/rewritten_captions.md:
- Rewrite each item from input/draft_captions.md into a clean, on-voice Instagram caption (<=220 characters), incorporating the tone and dos/don’ts from input/voice_guidelines.md and including #VictoriaClarkFans.
- Keep each rewrite paired with the original label or first line so I can tell which is which.

3) A concise planning summary saved to output/summary.md (1–2 pages) that:
- Briefly explains what you extracted from each input file and how it informed the plan.
- Identifies the two best-performing themes or tactics from input/past_posts.jsonl and how that shaped the calendar (e.g., question prompts, appreciation focus).
- Lists each June group event by event_id with the scheduled reminder and same-day dates you placed in the calendar to satisfy the 2‑day‑prior rule.
- Confirms weekly post counts and which approved snippets from input/approved_snippets.txt you used.
- Notes any assumptions you made and any gaps or follow-ups.

Inputs
- input/events.csv: June and nearby events for our group.
- input/voice_guidelines.md: Tone, dos/don’ts, and hashtag/CTA preferences.
- input/past_posts.jsonl: A few recent posts with engagement to learn what resonates.
- input/draft_captions.md: Rough, wordy caption ideas that need rewriting.
- input/approved_snippets.txt: Short, pre-approved phrases to sprinkle into captions.

Please make sure all three outputs are created, the calendar adheres to the constraints above, captions respect the character limits and voice, and every caption includes #VictoriaClarkFans. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
